compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
The close-time gate + signing integration. Optional (`verify.require_completion_verification_for_close`, default off). On a non-force close: verify → close → **sign on PASS** (verify→close→sign ordering, BL-5); FAIL/missing-LLM → fail-closed block; `--force-close` → close without sign (withhold the confirmation).

## Scope (files)
- `src/rebar/config.py`: `VerifyConfig.require_completion_verification_for_close: bool=False` + `_SECTIONS["verify"]` coercer.
- `src/rebar/_commands/txn.py`: factor `bug_close_reason_ok(reason)` shared predicate.
- `src/rebar/_commands/transition.py`: read ticket_type; `_completion_precheck` (outside lock; lazy `rebar.llm` import; `except Exception`→fail-closed; bug-reason precheck) BEFORE `transition_core`; sign via `signing.sign_manifest` AFTER a confirmed close; force-close skips verify+sign; update audit-comment wording.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] flag off → no verify call; flag on + PASS → close + SIGNATURE event (verify_signature==certified) AFTER the STATUS event
- [ ] FAIL → CommandError, no SIGNATURE, ticket stays open; missing-extra/any-exception → fail-closed block
- [ ] `--force-close` → closes, no SIGNATURE; ConcurrencyMismatch → no orphan SIGNATURE
- [ ] gate is alternatives-not-composed with `_signature_gate` (documented); when ENABLED but the LLM is unavailable it fails CLOSED; an UNREADABLE config fails this (opt-in) gate OFF with a warning — it must NOT preempt the signature gate or auto-enable across repos (refined during implementation; see commit)
compiled_state.title: WS-4: Close gate + config flag + signing integration
